# coolify_private_keys (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all Coolify private keys.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_private_keys" "all" {}

output "key_names" {
  value = [for k in data.coolify_private_keys.all.private_keys : k.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `private_keys` (Attributes List) The list of private keys. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--private_keys))

<a id="nestedatt--private_keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `private_keys`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) A description of the private key.
- `fingerprint` (String) The fingerprint of the private key.
- `is_git_related` (Boolean) Whether this key is used for Git operations.
- `name` (String) The name of the private key.
- `public_key` (String) The public key derived from the private key.
- `uuid` (String) The unique identifier of the private key.
